inputs.bug_report: parse_date crashes on empty string. Expected: returns None. Observed: ValueError.

expected_outputs.reproduction: Reproduced: call parse_date("") in a Python shell; it raises ValueError instead of returning None.
expected_outputs.failing_test:
diff --git a/tests/test_dates.py b/tests/test_dates.py
@@ assert parse_date('') is None @@

notes: Turns a bug report into a minimal reproduction and a test that fails before the fix.
